channel.title: Comments on: Terrapin Side Project 10: Capt’n Krunkles, Ep. 114
channel.description: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

item.title: By: David
item.dc:creator: David
item.description: Ooops. Misspoke. It's not Gamma Ray that's "gone year round" it's Gamma Ray's little sister, Sunray Wheat (http://www.terrapinbeer.com/beers/50-Sunray-Wheat-Beer). And it's Terrapin's summer seasonal. Either way, it's good stuff.
item.content:encoded: Ooops. Misspoke. It’s not Gamma Ray that’s “gone year round” it’s Gamma Ray’s little sister, Sunray Wheat (http://www.terrapinbeer.com/beers/50-Sunray-Wheat-Beer). And it’s Terrapin’s summer seasonal. Either way, it’s good stuff.
